info.title: Security Modeling API
info.description: Allow clients to fetch Analytics through APIs.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to fetch the terms and conditions for securities that have already been saved and exist on the FactSet side of your modeling data. It is designed for scenarios where you need to review or validate the details of securities that were previously created or modeled.

200.description: Expected response, returns a list of existing securities.

403.description: User is forbidden with current credentials

406.description: Unsupported Accept header. Header needs to be set to application/json.

429.description: Rate limit reached. Wait till the time specified in Retry-After header value to make further requests.

500.description: Server error. Log the X-DataDirect-Request-Key header to assist in troubleshooting.

503.description: Request timed out. Retry the request in sometime

post.description:
This endpoint enables you to model new securities or modify existing securities by supplying the appropriate terms and conditions.


 To determine which fields are required for a successful save, you can use the fields endpoint to retrieve the supported fields based on the security type you wish to model.


 It can take up to 1200 securities.

202.description: Expected response, contains the poll URL in the Location header.

403.description: User is forbidden with current credentials.

404.description: One or more upsert settings were unavailable.

406.description: Unsupported Accept header. Header needs to be set to application/json.

429.description: Rate limit reached. Wait till the time specified in Retry-After header value to make further requests.

500.description: Server error. Log the X-DataDirect-Request-Key header to assist in troubleshooting.

503.description: Request timed out. Retry the request in sometime

post.description: This endpoint allows you to permanently remove previously saved securities and their associated terms and conditions from your modeling data on the FactSet side. This endpoint is useful when a security was created in error, is no longer needed, or must be cleared before re-modeling with new terms.

202.description: Expected response, contains the poll URL in the Location header.

403.description: User is forbidden with current credentials.

404.description: One or more upsert settings were unavailable.

406.description: Unsupported Accept header. Header needs to be set to application/json.

429.description: Rate limit reached. Wait till the time specified in Retry-After header value to make further requests.

500.description: Server error. Log the X-DataDirect-Request-Key header to assist in troubleshooting.

503.description: Request timed out. Retry the request in sometime

get.summary: Get SM upsert or delete status by id
get.description:
This is the endpoint to check on the progress of a previously requested upsert or delete.
If the process has completed, the location header will point to the result url.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run SM upsert/delete endpoint

schema.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run SM upsert/delete endpoint

201.description: Expected response once upsert/delete is completed.

202.description: Expected response returned if the upsert/delete is not yet completed, should contain location header.

403.description: User is forbidden with current credentials.

404.description: One or more upsert settings were unavailable.

406.description: Unsupported Accept header. Header needs to be set to application/json.

429.description: Rate limit reached. Wait till the time specified in Retry-After header value to make further requests.

500.description: Server error. Log the X-DataDirect-Request-Key header to assist in troubleshooting.

503.description: Request timed out. Retry the request in sometime

get.summary: Get SM upsert or delete result by id
get.description:
This is the endpoint to get the result of a previously requested upsert/delete.
If the process has completed, the body of the response will contain the requested results in JSON.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Get SM upsert status by id endpoint

schema.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Get SM upsert status by id endpoint

200.description: Expected response once upsert/delete is completed, returns JSON in the format specified in the parameters.

errors.detail: Notional Exchange Type 'Exchange at Front &amp Back' is not valid
errors.title: notionalExchangeType value not allowed

errors.detail: Reset Frequency 'Monly' must not be longer than Payment Frequency 'Monthly' - Receiving Leg
errors.title: resetFreqRec value not allowed

403.description: User is forbidden with current credentials.

404.description: Result was already returned or provided id was not a requested upsert/delete.

429.description: Rate limit reached. Wait till the time specified in Retry-After header value to make further requests.

500.description: Server error. Log the X-DataDirect-Request-Key header to assist in troubleshooting.

503.description: Request timed out. Retry the request in sometime.

get.description:
This endpoint allows you to retrieve the complete list of fields supported for modeling a security based on its security type. Each field returned in this endpoint includes rich metadata designed to help you understand how to correctly populate terms and conditions for the Upsert workflow.

  **Security Type mappings for the `sectype` parameter:**

  | Security Type                | Sectype needed for templates |
  |-----------------------------|------------------------------|
  | Bond                        | BOND                         |
  | Bank Loan Facility          | BLF                          |
  | Mortgage Backed Security    | MBS                          |
  | Multi-Legged Bond           | MLB                          |
  | Custom Cash Flow            | CCF                          |
  | Tender Option Bond          | TOB                          |
  | Bond Forward                | BFW                          |
  | Bond Option/Lock            | BOPT                         |
  | Cross Currency Swap         | CCS                          |
  | Inflation Swap              | ISWP                         |
  | Interest Rate Cap/Floor     | IRCF                         |
  | CMS Rate Cap/Floor          | CRCF                         |
  | CMS Spread Cap/Floor        | CSCF                         |
  | Vanilla Interest Rate Swap  | VIRS                         |
  | Swaption                   | SWP                          |
  | Credit Default Swap         | CDS                          |
  | CDS Index Option            | CDSW                         |
  | Currency Forward            | CFW                          |
  | Total Return Swap           | TRS                          |
  | Option                      | OPT                          |
  | Variance Swap               | VSWP                         |
  | Fund                        | PE                           |
  | Real Estate                 | RE                           |

200.description: Expected response, returns a list of all template fields.

403.description: User is forbidden with current credentials.

406.description: Unsupported Accept header. Header needs to be set to application/json.

429.description: Rate limit reached. Wait till the time specified in Retry-After header value to make further requests.

500.description: Server error. Log the X-DataDirect-Request-Key header to assist in troubleshooting.

503.description: Request timed out. Retry the request in sometime

id.description: Identifier for the error (the Chain ID)

detail.description: Explanation specific to the occurrence of the error

RequestStatusRoot.description: The status of upsert or delete as per FactSets API standards.

RequestStatus.description: Details of the upsert or delete.

FieldsMap.description: A map of dynamic key-value pairs representing security fields.

category.description: Indicates the expected data type (e.g., string, int, double, boolean, or arrays). This helps ensure you supply values in the correct format.

mandatory.description: Shows whether the field is always required for successful modeling. If true, you must supply this field when creating or updating a security.

whenField.description: Specifies conditional requirements—certain fields become mandatory only when other fields have specific values.

description.description: A clear and intuitive explanation of what the field represents, making it easier to interpret than raw JSON keys.

WhenCondition.description: A single condition where a field becomes mandatory. Keys are fields and values are arrays of mandatory values.

ResponseLocationHeader.description: Url of the newly created resource

Long-Running-Location.description: Location to poll for the status of the job.

X-FactSet-Api-Request-Key.description: Key to uniquely identify an Analytics API request. Only available after successful authentication.

X-FactSet-Api-RateLimit-Limit.description: Number of allowed requests for the time window.

X-FactSet-Api-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Number of requests left for the time window.

X-FactSet-Api-RateLimit-Reset.description: Number of seconds remaining till rate limit resets.
